creator: olgeni@uli.it
text:
Please apply this too, or the port won't download the hotfix (oops).

diff -rcN zope.1/Makefile zope/Makefile
*** zope.1/Makefile	Sat Aug 12 20:39:11 2000
--- zope/Makefile	Sat Aug 12 20:54:27 2000
***************
*** 8,14 ****
  PORTNAME=	zope
  PORTVERSION=	2.2.0
  CATEGORIES=	www python
! MASTER_SITES=	http://www.zope.org/Products/Zope/${PORTVERSION}/
  DISTNAME=	Zope-${PORTVERSION}-src
  EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
  DISTFILES=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX} ${HOTFIX1}
--- 8,15 ----
  PORTNAME=	zope
  PORTVERSION=	2.2.0
  CATEGORIES=	www python
! MASTER_SITES=	http://www.zope.org/Products/Zope/${PORTVERSION}/ \
! 		http://www.zope.org/Products/Zope/Hotfix_08_09_2000/
  DISTNAME=	Zope-${PORTVERSION}-src
  EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
  DISTFILES=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX} ${HOTFIX1}
